name: Mango Chutney St. Kitts
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Golden raisins (1 cup), finely chopped
2 Fresh hot red peppers (preferably Scotch Bonnet), finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the mangoes and cut into 1-inch cubes.
2. Place the mango cubes in a heavy saucepan with all other ingredients.
3. Mix thoroughly.
4. Simmer, stirring occasionally, until the mixture has thickened, about half an hour.
5. Pour into sterilized jars.
6. Use with curries and cold meats.
